name: cluster('{cluster_url}').database('{database_name}').table('PBICacheClusterCapacityStatus')
description: This table contains the capacity status of the clusters.

schema.description: The week identifier, typically in the format 'YYYY-WW', representing the year and week number.
The name or identifier of the cluster.
The weekly average total capacity (number of node count) of the cluster.
The weekly average node capacity (number of node count) that is ready to use but empty. This is equivelant to Available node count.
The weekly average node capacity (number of node count) that is ready and used. This is equivelant to Allocated node count.
The weekly average OFR (Off For Repair) capacity (number of node count).
The weekly average unallocatable capacity (number of node count).
The weekly average human investigation capacity (number of node count).
The weekly average excluded capacity (number of node count).
The weekly average probation capacity (number of node count).
The weekly average suspected capacity (number of node count).
